title: GitHub import v2
goal: Improve GitHub issue import with URL parsing, checklist extraction, labels/metadata, --dry-run, and collision guidance.
acceptance: GitHub issue URLs are converted to gh issue view --repo arguments.
Checklist items become acceptance criteria and labels become areas.
--dry-run returns the generated slice without writing it.
must_ask_if: The slice requires changing the JSON-only worker result contract incompatibly.
The implementation would remove existing CLI/daemon commands.
Acceptance criteria conflict with the Khazad-Doom rule: You shall not slop.
